_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Knowledge of local area and wide area networking principles and concepts including bandwidth management.
reference_document_element_description: Knowledge of networking fundamentals relevant to data systems, including TCP/IP, DNS resolution, HTTP/HTTPS protocols, firewall and security group configurations, load balancing, and how network architecture affects data pipeline design and performance.
comments: DCWF ksa superset of WIDAI TF domain. TF-K-013 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: TF-K-006 (TF, cosine: 0.414), OP-K-007 (OP, cosine: 0.413).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 6.3/10 (raw 0.626). Shared vocabulary: [knowledge, networking]. DCWF-only terms [area, bandwidth, concepts, local, management, principles] vs WIDAI-only terms [affects, architecture, balancing, configurations, data, design] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.884 (P=0.897, R=0.871). P exceeds R by 0.025 — the DCWF element's 14 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 31 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the DCWF element.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.8%). "Knowledge of local area and wide area networking principles and concepts includi" and "Knowledge of networking fundamentals relevant to data systems, including TCP/IP," are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.593 ≈ STS 0.626 (gap 0.033). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [knowledge, networking] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 13.5%. Shared tokens: [knowledge, networking]. DCWF-only: [area, bandwidth, concepts, local, management, principles]. WIDAI-only: [affects, architecture, balancing, configurations, data, design].
